repos.name: ghg_emissions_dashboard
repos.desc: An interactive, web-based tool for exploring global greenhouse gas emissions data from EDGAR 2024. Built to make complex environmental data accessible and actionable.

groups.title: 🛠️ Developer Tools & Productivity
groups.desc: Extensions and tools to streamline the development workflow.

repos.name: shinyframeworks-vscode
repos.desc: A comprehensive VS Code extension designed to supercharge your Shiny development experience across multiple frameworks and languages.

groups.title: 🧠 Data Science & AI Tools
groups.desc: Packages and applications for machine learning, deep learning, and time series forecasting.

repos.name: kerasnip
repos.desc: A powerful bridge between the Keras deep learning ecosystem and the Tidymodels framework in R, making deep learning workflows tidy and intuitive.

repos.name: lstm_uts
repos.desc: A Shiny application implementing vanilla LSTM networks for univariate time series forecasting, offering a code-free environment for deep learning experiments.

repos.name: lstm_re
repos.desc: An advanced app for executing LSTM experiments on complex univariate and multivariate regression problems with automated feature engineering.

groups.title: 🎓 Master's Thesis
groups.desc: Academic research and applied portfolio management.

repos.name: tfm
repos.desc: Thesis project focused on the application of artificial neural networks and quadratic programming in portfolio management.

repos.name: tfm-site
repos.desc: The published, interactive site for my Master's Thesis, detailing the application of CNNs, LSTMs, and QP to portfolio optimization.

groups.title: 📚 Spanish R Translations
groups.desc: Collaborative projects bringing essential R and Data Science knowledge to the global Spanish-speaking community.

repos.name: r4ds-es
repos.desc: My personal spanish translation "R for Data Science"

repos.name: tmwr-es
repos.desc: My personal spanish translation "Tidy Modeling with R"

repos.name: ggplot2b-es
repos.desc: My personal translation of ggplot2 book

repos.name: hopr-es
repos.desc: My personal spanish translation "Hands-On Programming with R"

repos.name: hggh4r-es
repos.desc: My personal spanish translation "Happy Git and GitHub for the useR"
